---
title: LMU Open Science Summer School 2026
date: 2026-02-23
categories:
  - Summer School
event:
  start_date: '2026-09-07'
  end_date: '2026-09-11'
  description: |
    Save the date! Our annual Summer School will take place from September 7-11, 2026--more details to come!
  time: '9:00-17:00'
  location:
    name: 
    address: 
    map_url: 
  format:
    type: Hybrid
    detail: ''
  language:
    primary: English
    primary-code: en
    detail: en
  # flyer: assets/2022-09-27-crash-course-open-science-schedule.pdf
  flyer: images/2026-06-10-ospark-bootcamp-image.png
links:
  registration: 
  materials: 
  workshop_website:
event_description: |
  Save the date! Our annual Summer School will take place from September 7-11, 2026--more details to come!
instructors:
  - name: 
    url: ''

helpers:
  - name: 
contact:
  name: ''
  email: 
organizers:
  - name: ''
presenters:
  - name: ''
    url: ''
host:
  - name: ''
    url: ''

template: templates/event-template.html
filters:
    - templates/process-event-yaml.lua
---

 
```{=html}
<script>
document.addEventListener("DOMContentLoaded", () => {
  document.querySelectorAll('.flyer').forEach(el => {
    const src = el.dataset.src;
    const ext = src.split('.').pop().toLowerCase();

    let preview = '';

    if (['jpg','jpeg','png','webp','gif'].includes(ext)) {
      preview = `<img src="${src}" loading="lazy"
        style="max-width:100%; border-radius:10px;" />`;
    } else if (ext === 'pdf') {
      preview = `<iframe src="${src}" loading="lazy"
        width="100%" height="420" style="border:none; border-radius:10px;"></iframe>`;
    } else {
      preview = `<div style="padding:1rem; background:#eee;">
        Preview not available
      </div>`;
    }

    el.innerHTML = `
      <div style="margin-bottom:10px;">${preview}</div>
      <a href="${src}" target="_blank" class="flyer-link">
        Open full flyer ↗
      </a>
    `;
  });
});
</script>
```
